memory.summary: Lunch with cohort_3 is tempting, but I need to finish the assignment analysis first to get it over with.

desires: Finish the assignment analysis immediately to secure the grade and eliminate the looming deadline stress.
Avoid any awkwardness or confrontation with teammates by getting my work done alone rather than negotiating group dynamics.
Get the task over with so I can impulsively switch to leisure or sleep without feeling guilty about unfinished work.

goals.description: Finish the assignment analysis immediately to secure the grade and eliminate looming stress.
goals.rationale: My achievement value (0.5) is dominant; I need to lock in the grade before the deadline hits. My impulsive nature and short planning horizon mean I want to get this 'done' now to stop the mental nagging, even if it means ignoring social cues.

goals.description: Politely decline cohort_3's lunch invitation to avoid awkward group negotiation or conflict.
goals.rationale: I am highly avoidant of interpersonal friction. Negotiating a group lunch takes energy and risks conflict, which I want to minimize. Since my academic value outweighs relationships (0.15), skipping lunch is an easy trade-off to preserve my focus and avoid drama.

goals.description: Switch impulsively to leisure or sleep immediately after finishing the analysis.
goals.rationale: This is the reward for my impulsive desire to 'get it over with.' I will discount the future consequences (like missing the meal or later fatigue) in favor of immediate gratification once the task is checked off.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances high-priority academic goal (0.5) to secure grade and kill stress immediately. Avoids social negotiation with cohort_3 to prevent conflict, prioritizing task completion over relationships (0.15). Impulsive need to finish 'now' overrides the meal.
